【传统玄幻+架空+穿越+无系统+扮猪吃虎】
凌逸当了十年纨绔，满帝都皆当他是废物，却无人知其藏锋十年:
左手掌暗影阁，覆手翻云掌江湖；
右手握醉月楼，敛财布局掌人心！
当杀机再现，十年隐忍终破局，他身后双娇齐齐现身：
才女苏浅汐执棋落子：“夫君，这朝堂这局，你想如何屠？”
侍女瑶儿长剑出鞘：“世子，江湖这边，我替你杀穿！”
彼时，凌逸对着满朝朱紫百官：“十年前的血债，该还了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ce21c902dc5999a4d3ba43da4b65967d","author":"灵雾山主","author_id":"","book_id":"7592298684121877566","book_name":"藏拙十年，纨绔世子摊牌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592299087668462142","read_count":"118800","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"338304"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"155","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,多女主,扮猪吃虎,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4a51242bcf746415066a8b5edcba0e8b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177674&x-signature=BCgcbrQFbQECBVcY7cieCnKn4lA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"85810839526","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"15"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201601146619B7A148994704214F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"list
